tweets.content: Realized my Astrology Content Engine was missing a crucial file. Fixed that by adding tweets.json and updated upload_to_cloudinary.py. Now, zodiac insights are just a cloud upload away AstrologyContentEngine #Cloudinary

Refactored my Astrology Content Engine's pipeline with a fresh script from Claude. Replaced 87 lines of code with 82 new ones, making my viral horoscope generator more efficient and accurate. Less code, more cosmic insights

Spent the night fixing a pesky bug in my Astrology Content Engine. Now, the daily horoscope reel pipeline runs smoothly, generating 760+ lines of Python code to serve up personalized astrology content to users." #AstrologyContentEngine
Simplified reel rendering in Astrology-Content-Engine by fixing a wonky workflow path. Now, generating horoscope content for users is smoother and more efficient. #AstrologyTech

Simplified my Astrology Content Engine by removing unnecessary app code, cutting 1265 lines in one commit. Now my engine is leaner and focused on generating tweets from data in tweets.json." #AstrologyDev

Cleaning up the Astrology-Content-Engine codebase, one file at a time. Updated .gitignore to keep our project organized and focused on what matters - generating astrology content for users." #AstrologyCode
